commit_message:
Fix i elaboration issue Fix i elaboration issue * During DC Synthesis, ran into issue: "tt_dfd/rtl/trace/dfd_cross_connect.sv:68: Net 'i[0]', or a directly connected net, is driven by more than one source, and at least one source is a constant net. (ELAB-368)". 

* Issue was caused by `int i` being instantied in the module scope even though two always blocks used i as a loop var. Fix removes module scoped i and each for loop declares i itself.

examples.commit_message:
Fix i elaboration issue Fix i elaboration issue * During DC Synthesis, ran into issue: "tt_dfd/rtl/trace/dfd_cross_connect.sv:68: Net 'i[0]', or a directly connected net, is driven by more than one source, and at least one source is a constant net. (ELAB-368)". 

* Issue was caused by `int i` being instantied in the module scope even though two always blocks used i as a loop var. Fix removes module scoped i and each for loop declares i itself.
